title: hellenia allughas
intro: Hellenia allughas, also known as Hellebore, is a flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant contains alkaloids with medicinal properties, including helleborin and hellebrin, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Hellenia allughas include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can be used to relieve pain and reduce inflammation in the body. Hellenia allughas is often prepared as a tincture or infusion for medicinal use.
